evals.name: embed-and-upsert-code-file
evals.prompt: I have a Python file at /tmp/sample_code.py and I want to embed it with Voyage AI and store it in my Pinecone index called code-corpus-voyage under the namespace 'pono'. Walk me through it and write the command I should run.
evals.expected_output: Skill should reference scripts/embed_and_upsert.py with --model voyage-code-3 (because it's code), --input-type document (or default), correct --index and --namespace flags, and confirm VOYAGE_API_KEY / PINECONE_API_KEY are set.

evals.name: model-selection-for-code
evals.prompt: I'm building a code search feature for my Rust monorepo. Which Voyage model should I use, and why? Should I worry about dimensions?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend voyage-code-3 with reasoning (trained on code, beats general models on code retrieval). Should mention 1024-dim default is fine for Pinecone, and Matryoshka truncation is available if storage matters. Should NOT recommend voyage-4-large by default for code.

evals.name: migrate-integrated-to-voyage
evals.prompt: My code-corpus index in Pinecone currently uses llama-text-embed-v2 as an integrated model. I want to migrate it to use voyage-code-3 instead. What's the safest plan? I have ~50k records across 8 repo namespaces.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend parallel-run path: create new standard index code-corpus-voyage with dim=1024 metric=cosine, re-ingest with embed_and_upsert.py per namespace, side-by-side compare a few queries before swapping memory-config.json. Should NOT recommend in-place migration. Should mention input_type=document for re-ingest.
